description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Container Image Deployment CI that runs on push to master, deploy-* branches, and tags matching v*.*.*. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy for robotoff-org and robotoff-net environments. Wait for a build workflow to complete, then SSH into a host to clone a repository, set environment variables, create Docker volumes, start services, check if services are up, run health tests, and perform cleanup. Finally, create a Grafana annotation.
